creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
after "make readmes" in /usr/ports, the top-level README.html file
points to the local handbook as
file://localhost/usr/share/doc/handbook/handbook.html but that doesn't
exist. the proper link is file://localhost/usr/share/doc/handbook/index.html

Fix: 

edit Templates/README.top to fix the link.
How-To-Repeat: 
cvsup docs and ports, make install in docs.  Go to
file://localhost/usr/ports/README.html and click on the link to local
handbook.  it will fail to find the file.
